creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Some files don't appear available during a "make clean package", using FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE  r328914M amd64  1101509 1101509

# Options set
# make -C /usr/ports/security/snort -DUSE_C3 showconfig|grep =on
     APPID=on: Build with application id support (EXPERIMENTAL)
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     FILEINSPECT=on: Build with extended file inspection features (EXPERIMENTAL)
     GRE=on: GRE support
     IPV6=on: IPv6 in snort.conf
     NORMALIZER=on: Normalizer
     PERFPROFILE=on: Performance profiling
     SOURCEFIRE=on: Sourcefire recommended build options
     BARNYARD=on: Depend on barnyard2 (supports also snortsam)
     PULLEDPORK=on: Depend on pulledpork


Result:
===>  Installing for snort-2.9.11.1

actual-package-depends: dependency on /usr/lib/libpcap.so not registered (normal if it belongs to base)
